findings: No review blocks found (may need JS)
Google Shopping requires complex XHR calls and is heavily JS-dependent
Not feasible via plain HTTP — requires browser automation
Alternative: Google Shopping API is deprecated
Amazon Product Advertising API: 官方API，含评论摘要但非全文 [免费（需Affiliate）, value: 有限]
Rainforest API (Amazon): 第三方，完整评论数据 [$49/mo起, value: 高]
Trustpilot API: 官方API，获取商家评论 [免费层可用, value: 中]
ReviewMeta: 评论分析工具，有API [免费, value: 中（非原始数据）]
Google Places API: Google商家评价 [免费层（$200/月额度）, value: 低（仅本地商家）]
